issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Animal Kingdom Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.
Condition structure incorrect. Should use LeaderHasType with type value, not name field with card name.
Action type should be 'PlayFromHand' not 'SearchDeck'. The card is played from trash, not searched from deck.
Filter is incomplete. Must specify: maxCost: 6000, hasBaseEffect: false, kind: 'Character'. Current filter only has cost restriction.
